## Description

<!-- Brief description of the change. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test addition or update

## Privacy Review (REQUIRED for v0.3.0+)

- [ ] No new third-party JavaScript dependencies
- [ ] No change to what data the Lens sends
- [ ] If bundle format changed, both bundle tests pass
- [ ] If manifest changed, no-npm CI check passes

## Testing

- [ ] All test suites pass
- [ ] New test cases added for new functionality

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated relevant docs/
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md

## Security

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or PII committed
- [ ] No new network calls to non-AegisGate domains

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`)
